name: Snow Peas & Water Chestnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the ends and strings off the snow peas.
2. Rinch and drain the water chestnuts.
3. Dry on paper towel.
4. In a large non-stick skillet or wok, heat walnut oil and sesame oil.
5. Add snow peas and stir-fry for about 2 minutes.
6. Add water chestnuts and stir-fry for another 2 minutes.
7. Season with salt and pepper.
Food Exchange per serving: 2 VEGETABLE EXCHANGES + 1/2 FAT EXCHANGE; CAL: 99; CHO: 0mg; CAR: 10g; PRO: 3g; SOD: 69mg; FAT: 3g.
